TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami_Sin'ge_de_Lutu, title = Sin'ge_de_Lutu, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Amis]}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/wiki/Sin'ge_de_Lutu} }

S.FORM: O Sin'gedelutu (Holam: śĖįŚźĄÁöĄśóÖťÄĒ, ira ko ) cacey kamoko'ay a tilifi ega i Taywan. Misanga' Pipahosoan to tilifi no Yen-cu-min ci ina to tilifi ega. Mipasadak to 2013 a miheca. Mianingaya a patingso^ Lalao Layis Pai Ping-ping
S.PHON: o~u sin °*…ô…¨~…ģ…ô…ĺo~u~uto~u~u (ńßo~u…ĺam: *****, ira ko~u ) ¶a ¶…ôj kamo~uko~u °aj a ti…ĺifi …ô*a i tajwan. misaŇča ° pipańßo~uso~uan to~u ti…ĺifi no~u j…ôn- ¶o~u~u-min ¶i ina to~u ti…ĺifi …ô*a. mipasa…¨~…ģak to~u **** a mińß…ô ¶a. mianiŇčaja a patiŇčso~u Ē …ĺa…ĺao~u …ĺajis pai piŇč-piŇč
S.FORM: O Sin'gedelutu (Holam: śĖįŚźĄÁöĄśóÖťÄĒ, ira ko ) cacey kamoko'ay a tilifi ega i Taywan. Misanga' Pipahosoan to tilifi no Yen-cu-min ci ina to tilifi ega. Mipasadak to 2013 a miheca. Mianingaya a patingso^ Lalao Layis Pai Ping-ping
